content_body: The 10-hour Blue Ridge Adventure Race is perfect for sports or family teams looking to have some fun discovering the outdoors with adventure racing. Easy to read and simple navigation will take you to some hidden spots around Blue Ridge. Distances are always based on your team's abilities and speed in adventure racing; however, you can expect between 20–30 miles of mountain biking and 5–8 miles of trekking with 4–8 miles of canoeing. Make lasting memories on your North Georgia getaway with this exciting activity scheduled annually during the month of May!
title: Blue Ridge Adventure Race
